name: Perfect Webinar Stack Close (+ Post-Webinar Follow-Up)
source_books: Expert Secrets (Russell Brunson) — The Perfect Webinar, The Stack, Trial Closes, The One Thing
Marketing Secrets Blackbook — Stack Don't Switch, The Power of the Bonus, Urgency & Scarcity
Copywriting Secrets (Edwards) — offer block, guarantee, dollars-for-dimes, CTA
framework: The Stack is Brunson's offer-reveal mechanism that anchors perceived value far above price, then closes. It is the climax of the Perfect Webinar (intro/big domino → 3 secrets that break false beliefs → THE STACK → close). This template covers (a) the Stack close itself as deliverable script, and (b) the post-webinar email/SMS follow-up that re-runs the Stack and urgency for non-buyers.

trigger.entry_conditions: Registered; the webinar/VSL presents the Stack close.
trigger.exit_conditions: Purchase → buyer onboarding. Replay/cart window expires → Stack-recap follow-up ends; drop to nurture.

channels: Live/auto webinar or VSL (the Stack is delivered here)

the_stack_mechanics.principle: Reveal the offer ONE element at a time. After each element, RESTATE the entire cumulative stack with its growing total value. The eye/ear keeps seeing the value pile grow, so when the price drops it feels tiny ('dollars for dimes').
stack_slide_pattern: Element 2: '+ [Asset 2] (value $Y)' → restate: 'So far you're getting Core + Asset 2 = $X+$Y'
Element 3: '+ [Asset 3] (value $Z)' → restate full stack total again
Continue stacking bonuses/tools/community/support, restating the cumulative total each time
Final stack total revealed (e.g. 'Total real value: $N')
PRICE REVEAL far below total (anchor) → 'but you won't pay $N… not even half… your investment today is just $P'
GUARANTEE (risk reversal) → URGENCY/fast-action BONUS that expires → CTA
the_stack_mechanics.trial_closes: Sprinkle low-commitment 'yes' questions THROUGHOUT (not just at the end): 'Does that make sense?', 'Could you see yourself using this?', 'If all this did was [one result], would it be worth $P?'. Trial closes pre-commit the audience so the final ask is a formality.
the_stack_mechanics.the_one_thing: Tie the whole offer back to the ONE big domino belief: if they believe this one thing, they MUST buy. The Stack delivers the vehicle to that one thing.

copy_persona.primary: Russell Brunson — Perfect Webinar / The Stack / Trial Closes
supporting: Jim Edwards — the offer block (what/how/when/how much), guarantee, dollars-for-dimes, single CTA, P.S.
Brunson — The Power of the Bonus (turn objections into bonuses), Stack Don't Switch

sequence.beat: Indoctrination / show-up sequence: confirm registration, build anticipation, tease the ONE big secret. 2–4 emails + SMS reminders (24h, 1h, live-now).

Deliver content (3 secrets breaking vehicle/internal/external false beliefs) → transition to THE STACK → stack each element with value, restating cumulative total → price reveal → guarantee → fast-action bonus + urgency → CTA. Trial-close throughout.
sequence.persona_formula: The Stack + Trial Closes + The One Thing

sequence.beat: 'Replay + the offer is live' — link to replay page (countdown) and the order page. Restate the Stack in writing (Edwards offer block).
Written Stack recap: every element + value + 'which means…', the price anchor, the guarantee, FAQ/objections-as-bonuses.
sequence.purpose: Logic close for the analytical non-buyer.
sequence.persona_formula: Brunson Power of the Bonus + Edwards proof/guarantee

sequence.beat: Fast-action bonus expiring / cart closing in 24h. Restate scarcity levers.
Final hours: replay comes down / bonus gone / price rises. Last-call emails + SMS.
Cart closed. Buyers → onboarding + ascend (Stack Don't Switch). Non-buyers → Seinfeld nurture; optional auto-webinar re-invite later.

ghl_build.workflow_name: Perfect Webinar — Show-Up + Stack Close Follow-Up
ghl_build.trigger: Workflow Trigger: 'Form Submitted' = webinar registration form → Tag 'webinar-reg-[event]'.
actions: PRE: registration confirmation email → reminder emails (24h, 1h) + SMS (1h, 'we're live') → optional 'add to calendar'.
ATTENDANCE: tag by behavior — 'attended-live', 'watched-to-stack' (watch% via webinar platform webhook), 'no-show'.
POST: same-day replay+offer email/SMS → Day1 Stack-recap (logic) → Day2 T-24h urgency → Day2 T-3h/T-1h close, all gated by a fixed cart-close datetime.
Replay page = GHL funnel page with countdown timer wired to the SAME cart-close datetime; order page with order bump + OTOs.
wait_steps: Use 'Wait until' the fixed webinar time for PRE reminders; 'Wait until' the fixed cart-close datetime for the Fear-phase beats so on-page countdown == email/SMS == reality.
if_else: Branch on attendance: 'attended-live' → shorter, hotter follow-up; 'no-show' → 'you missed it, here's the replay (24h only)' path.
Branch on watch%: 'watched-to-stack' → tag 'saw-offer', go straight to urgency cadence; 'left-before-stack' → re-pitch the offer in the recap email.
PURCHASE GOAL ('buyer-[offer]') anywhere → exit, buyer onboarding + ascend, STOP close emails.
ghl_build.notes: GoHighLevel: the on-page COUNTDOWN TIMER (replay + order page) must read from the same cart-close datetime as the Fear-phase waits — that is what makes urgency real. Build the order page with the written Stack mirroring the webinar Stack slide, an order bump, and 1–2 OTOs. Pull watch% via the webinar tool's webhook into GHL tags to drive attendance/watch branching. HONOR the close: when the timer hits zero, replay comes down and bonus/price genuinely change.

integrity_guardrails: Every Stack element's stated value must be real/defensible (dollars-for-dimes done honestly).
Fast-action bonus and cart-close must be HONORED — bonus genuinely expires, replay genuinely comes down (Edwards Secret #18; Blackbook).
Trial closes are honest yes-ladders, not manipulation; never claim a result you can't prove.
